title: Migrate an Oban-using test module from drain_queue to perform_job
prompt: Rewrite `test/my_app/reporting_worker_test.exs` that currently has 5 tests each inserting a job via `Oban.insert` then calling `Oban.drain_queue`. Convert all 5 to use `perform_job/3` with string-keyed args, each test asserting the downstream effect of the worker. Include `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo`. Must NOT contain `Oban.drain_queue` or `Oban.insert` in the test bodies — replace them with direct `perform_job` calls.
